failureClass.label: Git safe.directory ownership failure
failureClass.summary: Git rejected a mounted checkout because the repository ownership differs from the user inside the runner or container.
recommendations: Re-run the failing container command with the same mounted checkout path.
Confirm whether the container user differs from the checkout owner.
If this is expected in CI, add the mounted checkout path with git config --global --add safe.directory <path> before commands that inspect Git state.
